name: kordoc
description: Single-plugin marketplace shipping kordoc — Korean official-document toolkit (.hwp/.hwpx/.hml + PDF/DOCX/XLS/XLSX) for Claude.

plugins.name: kordoc
plugins.description: Parse, generate, fill, patch, compare, validate, and render Korean official documents (HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, DOCX, XLS/XLSX) in Claude — 공문서 프리셋 생성(기안문·보고서·계획서·통지·회의록), 서식 보존 빈칸 채우기, 라운드트립 패치, 조판 SVG 렌더. Powered by the kordoc npm CLI/MCP — no Hancom Office required.
